creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 6/25/12 4:34 AM, Alexey Markov wrote:
> Just in case I attached two logs of port building with and without
> ICU option. Maybe it will be useful...
>
actually, no, as a port committer, I just commit the port after testing it.

If you need help fixing the port, I suggest you email freebsd-ports@ 
mailing list.
